creator: matt@cloverbasin.com
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #2)

Disabling this package for 5.1 would be a good short-term work around to prevent the bug.

In my opinion, the proper solution would be to emulate what luarocks does, which is to build and install the bit32 module to satisfy the luaposix dependency: https://luarocks.org/manifests/siffiejoe/bit32-scm-1.rockspec
